topic.ja: しょくどうで　せきに　すわって　いいか　きく
topic.en: Asking if a seat is available in the cafeteria
topic.de: In der Kantine nach einem freien Platz fragen
topic.fr: Demander si une place est libre à la cantine
topic.es: Preguntar si un asiento está libre en la cafetería

ja.intro: しょくどうです。ここに　すわりたいです。なんといいますか。

options.text: ここ、すわりましょうか。

ja.question: なんといいますか。

tr.intro: Yemekhandesiniz. Buraya oturmak istiyorsunuz. Ne söylersiniz?

options.text: Burası uygun mu? / Burada oturabilir miyim?

tr.question: Ne söylersiniz?

en.intro: You are at the cafeteria. You want to sit here. What do you say?

options.text: Is this seat taken? / Is this okay?

en.question: What do you say?

de.intro: Sie sind in der Kantine. Sie möchten hier sitzen. Was sagen Sie?

options.text: Ist hier noch frei? / Ist das in Ordnung?

de.question: Was sagen Sie?

fr.intro: Vous êtes à la cantine. Vous voulez vous asseoir ici. Que dites-vous?

options.text: C'est libre ici? / Puis-je m'asseoir ici?
Vous ne vous asseyez pas ici?

fr.question: Que dites-vous?

es.intro: Estás en la cafetería. Quieres sentarte aquí. ¿Qué dices?

options.text: ¿Está ocupado aquí? / ¿Está bien si me siento?

es.question: ¿Qué dices?

ko.intro: 식당에 있습니다. 여기에 앉고 싶습니다. 뭐라고 말합니까?
ko.question: 뭐라고 말합니까?

meanings.tr: uygun mu? / olur mu? / iyi mi? (izin istemek için kullanılan kısa ve nazik soru)
meanings.en: is it okay? / may I? (short polite question used to ask permission)
meanings.de: ist es in Ordnung? / darf ich? (kurze höfliche Frage für Erlaubnis)
meanings.fr: c'est d'accord? / puis-je? (courte question polie pour demander la permission)
meanings.es: ¿está bien? / ¿puedo? (pregunta corta y cortés para pedir permiso)
meanings.ko: 괜찮습니까? / 돼요? (허락을 구하는 짧고 정중한 질문)

meanings.en: to sit (action of sitting on a chair or floor)

grammar.point: ここ、いいですか (場所の許可確認)

meanings.tr: Bir yerin (özellikle sandalye, koltuk) uygun olup olmadığını sormak için kullanılan kısa ve doğal ifade.
meanings.en: Short natural expression to ask if a place (especially a seat) is available or okay to use.
meanings.de: Kurzer natürlicher Ausdruck, um zu fragen, ob ein Platz frei ist.
meanings.fr: Expression courte et naturelle pour demander si une place est disponible.
meanings.es: Expresión corta y natural para preguntar si un lugar está disponible.
meanings.ko: 자리가 비어 있는지 확인할 때 쓰는 짧고 자연스러운 표현.

logic.tr: Ok karakteri boş sandalyeye oturmak için izin isteyen kişidir. '1. ここ、いいですか' (Burası uygun mu?) doğrudur — sandalyeye oturmadan önce izin istemek için kullanılan doğal ve kısa ifadedir. Seçenek 2 'ここ、すわりませんか' karşıdaki kişiyi buraya oturmaya davet eder; oysa ok karakteri kendisi oturmak istemektedir (Yön Karışıklığı). Seçenek 3 'ここ、すわりましょうか' 'birlikte oturalım mı?' anlamına gelir; yabancı birine böyle denmez (Yön Karışıklığı).
logic.en: The arrow character wants to sit in an available seat and is asking for permission. '1. ここ、いいですか' is correct — short natural expression to ask if a seat is free. Option 2 'ここ、すわりませんか' invites the other person to sit here — wrong direction (Direction Confusion). Option 3 'ここ、すわりましょうか' means 'shall we sit here together' — inappropriate for a stranger (Direction Confusion).
logic.de: '1. ここ、いいですか' ist korrekt. Option 2 'ここ、すわりませんか' lädt die andere Person ein, sich zu setzen (Richtungsverwechslung). Option 3 'ここ、すわりましょうか' bedeutet 'setzen wir uns zusammen' — unangemessen für Fremde (Richtungsverwechslung).
logic.fr: '1. ここ、いいですか' est correct. L'option 2 'ここ、すわりませんか' invite l'autre personne à s'asseoir (confusion de direction). L'option 3 'ここ、すわりましょうか' signifie 'on s'assoit ensemble' — inapproprié pour un inconnu (confusion de direction).
logic.es: '1. ここ、いいですか' es correcto. La opción 2 'ここ、すわりませんか' invita a la otra persona a sentarse (confusión de dirección). La opción 3 'ここ、すわりましょうか' significa 'nos sentamos juntos' — inapropiado para un extraño (confusión de dirección).
logic.ko: '1. ここ、いいですか'가 정답입니다. 선택지 2 'ここ、すわりませんか'는 상대방에게 앉도록 권유하는 말입니다(방향 혼동). 선택지 3 'ここ、すわりましょうか'는 '함께 앉을까요?'라는 뜻으로 낯선 사람에게 쓰기 어색합니다(방향 혼동).

image_prompt: Simple manga-style line drawing, black and white. A school or workplace cafeteria. On the LEFT, a young woman with simple round head stands holding a tray with food, looking at a table where another young man with simple round head is seated eating. There is an empty chair at the table. She gestures toward the empty seat with a questioning expression. Cartoon style with simple round faces, clean outlines, white background, no shading, no color, no text, no arrows. Same style as JLPT N5 textbook manga illustrations.
